creator: wenheping@gmail.com
text:
pear-Services_Blogging provides a unified API to
post and read blog entries, independent of the API
supported by the server software hosting the blog.
It uses a driver-based approach to communicate with
different APIs out there. If a new blogging API is
invented, someone just needs to write a driver for
the Services_Blogging package, and everyone can
access also this blogs.

WWW: http://pear.php.net/package/Services_Blogging/

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
